title: Device Authorization Request DTO
description: Request body for POST /api/v1/auth/device/authorize. Public CLI clients request an RFC 8628-style device code; portal approval by a verified logged-in user is required before the poll endpoint can issue a project-scoped API key.

client_id.description: Public device-flow client identifier, e.g. the Python SDK CLI client id.

scope.description: Optional space-delimited scope request using user-requestable canonical API-key scope tokens. Privileged platform scopes such as admin:all cannot be requested by public device-flow clients. The approved token is always constrained to the approved default project.
